corrections.current:
οὐκ ἄνευ τῶν γεγονότων τεκμηρίων τῇ βίᾳ τῶν κεραυνῶν·
(13) καὶ γὰρ χαλεπωτέραν μισοξενίαν ἐπετήδευσαν.
corrections.correct:
οὐκ ἄνευ τῶν γεγονότων τεκμηρίων τῇ βίᾳ τῶν κεραυνῶν·
δικαίως γὰρ ἔπασχον ταῖς ἰδίαις αὐτῶν πονηρίαις,
(13) καὶ γὰρ χαλεπωτέραν μισοξενίαν ἐπετήδευσαν.
corrections.note: Entire printed line omitted from body.
Transcript substitutes a different verb; image clearly reads ἐξῄει.

corrections.location: left margin/body verse numbering around Wis 19:15-19
corrections.note: Right-margin page line numbers '(14) (15) (16) (17) (18)' are present in the scan; transcript correctly ignores them, but the parenthetical '(13)' in body is a captured line number, not body text/verse numbering.
Parenthetical line number from margin has been inserted into body text.

notes: Running head matches. Apparatus appears to match the scan. Main body has one omitted line at v.13 and one wrong final verb at v.17; also a marginal line number '(13)' was captured into the body.
